title: athanasia quinquedentata subsp. quinquedentata
intro: Athanasia quinquedentata subsp. quinquedentata, also known as the Mountain Everlasting or Queen Anne's Tears, is a flowering plant species within the daisy family. It is characterized by its white to pinkish flowers and has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits associated with Athanasia quinquedentata subsp. quinquedentata include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. Athanasia quinquedentata subsp. quinquedentata is typically prepared as an infusion or a tincture, and can be used as an herbal remedy for topical applications, such as treating skin irritations and minor wounds.
